title: 心のメモリーに残っても……

text_block_list.name: Cooking Enthusiast Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Okay, everyone! I'm all finished in the kitchen,
and the food turned out even better than
expected! Please dig in!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Wow, it all looks so scrumptious! Is it okay if I
take a photo of the food? And of course I need
the chef in the shot!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Oh no, there's no more space!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I guess I have to delete some photos... Ugh,
there's no way I can choose!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Unable to record this new memory, Fine Motion's
spirits dip slightly.
